body_excerpt: In DevmemIntPFNotify of devicemem_server.c, there is a possible use-after-free due to a race condition. This could lead to local escalation of privilege in the kernel with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In DevmemIntPFNotify of devicemem_server.c, there is a possible use-after-free due to a race condition. This could lead to local escalation of privilege in the kernel with no additional execution priv
